basicInfo.name: Nightmare Yuri
basicInfo.flavor: Yuri joined Evan's Crew in an effort to stop Bane and Kris's coalition. She seems very happy to be at Evan's side again.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Energy Drain
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 285% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 285% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Magic Orb
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - Deals additional damage equal to 170% of Magic Attack against targets inflicted with [Burn].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Fox Charm
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Crit Rate Boost. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Crit Rate Boost to 21%.

profile.story:
Yuri is the leader of the three-tailed foxes from Fox's Oasis in the Blazing Desert.
Yuri was once a member of the Shadow Clan, and used her experience dealing with information there to make Fox's Oasis the information trading hub that it is today.
However, Fox's Oasis's rise to fame and wealth also attracted many bad actors.
The most notable among them is Leo the lion beastkin, whose many attempts to take over the town made him a constant thorn in Yuri's side.
After Evan's crew helped to get rid of Leo, she joined them on a whim since she was getting bored of watching over Fox's Oasis.
